channel.title: aqueous solubility; vapor pressure; octanol-water partition coefficient; experimental determination; thermodynamic modelling; phthalates on LMI
channel.description: Recent content in aqueous solubility; vapor pressure; octanol-water partition coefficient; experimental determination; thermodynamic modelling; phthalates on LMI

item.title: Experimental Measurements And Thermodynamic Modelling Of Aqueous Solubilities, Octanol-Water Partition Coefficients And Vapor Pressures Of Dimethyl Phthalate And Butyl Benzyl Phthalate
